exercises.title: SPDC Source Optimizer
exercises.description: Build a comprehensive SPDC source simulator with optimization.
tasks: Model different crystal types (BBO, PPLN, PPKTP)
Calculate pair rate vs pump power curve
Compare spectral brightness of different configurations
exercises.expectedOutput: SPDC source optimization tool with parameter sweeps
hints: Pair rate scales linearly with pump power
Collection efficiency depends on mode matching
PPLN has higher efficiency but narrower bandwidth
Consider both colinear and noncolinear geometries

exercises.title: Quantum Dot Fine Structure Analyzer
exercises.description: Simulate quantum dot entanglement with realistic parameters.
tasks: Simulate time-bin encoding to overcome splitting
exercises.expectedOutput: Quantum dot entanglement simulator with tuning
hints: FSS < 1 μeV needed for high fidelity
Time-bin encoding erases which-path from FSS
Strain tuning can reduce FSS to near zero

exercises.title: DLCZ Protocol Simulator
exercises.description: Implement full DLCZ entanglement protocol with optimizations.
hints: Lower write probability reduces double excitations
Balance excitation probability vs success rate
Memory time limits maximum attempt window
Fiber loss dominates at long distances

exercises.title: Entanglement Tomography Tool
exercises.description: Build a two-qubit state tomography system.
hints: Use maximum likelihood for physical states
